name: frontend-dev-tools
description: Development tools for frontend linting and formatting

scripts.minify:js:static: find static/js/full -name '*.js' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'out=$(echo {} | sed "s|static/js/full/|static/js/min/|"); mkdir -p $(dirname $out) && ./node_modules/.bin/terser {} -o $out --compress'
scripts.minify:js:non: find non-static/full -name '*.js' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'out=$(echo {} | sed "s|non-static/full/|non-static/min/|"); mkdir -p $(dirname $out) && ./node_modules/.bin/terser {} -o $out --compress'
scripts.minify:css: find static/css/full -name '*.css' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'out=$(echo {} | sed "s|static/css/full/|static/css/min/|"); mkdir -p $(dirname $out) && ./node_modules/.bin/csso-cli {} -o $out'
